results.title: AI Agents Course
results.summary: A free Hugging Face course from beginner to expert on understanding, using, and building AI agents.

results.title: Generative AI with Large Language Models
results.summary: A DeepLearning.AI course on the generative AI lifecycle, transformer architecture, training, tuning, inference, and LLM-powered applications.

results.title: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)
results.summary: A DeepLearning.AI course on designing, building, deploying, and evaluating production-ready RAG applications.

results.title: AI Agents for Image and Video Generation
results.summary: A DeepLearning.AI course on building media agents that generate, evaluate, and iterate on image and video outputs.

results.title: Beginner: Introduction to Generative AI
results.summary: A Google Skills learning path covering generative AI concepts, LLM fundamentals, and responsible AI principles.

results.title: LLM Engineering: Prompting, Fine-Tuning, Optimization and RAG
results.summary: A Coursera specialization on end-to-end LLM engineering, prompt design, evaluation, fine-tuning, optimization, and RAG.

results.title: Trustworthy AI: Managing Bias, Ethics, and Accountability
results.summary: A Coursera course on ethical, social, and technical aspects of AI and machine learning.

results.title: AI Ethics
results.summary: A DataCamp course covering ethical considerations in artificial intelligence.
